@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "serverless-workflow-420-refactor-rest-operation",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "serverless-workflow: Refactor `rest` Operation",
+    "description": "Refactor `rest` Operation. Requested by 4+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current serverless-workflow deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your serverless-workflow version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n serverless-workflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=serverless-workflow\nhelm list -n serverless-workflow 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working serverless-workflow installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review serverless-workflow configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant serverless-workflow configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n serverless-workflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=serverless-workflow\nkubectl get configmap -n serverless-workflow -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=serverless-workflow\n```\n**What would you like to be added**:\n\n1. Rename the `rest` operation type into `openapi`: the actual REST operation is an `openapi` operation, and could therefore be confusing to some.\n2."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Refactor `rest` Operation",
+        "description": "I liked the idea and this will help us on Kogito to reuse some work :)\n\nAbout the REST function definition _per se_, I like the [JAX-RS approach of using annotations](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jakarta_RESTful_Web_Services), we could leverage their docs to avoid reinventing the wheel. I remember\n```yaml\n- name: MyOperation\n  operation: 'http://mysite.com/api/{pathParam}#POST'\n  type: rest\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n serverless-workflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=serverless-workflow\nkubectl get events -n serverless-workflow --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Refactor `rest` Operation\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I liked the idea and this will help us on Kogito to reuse some work :)\n\nAbout the REST function definition _per se_, I like the [JAX-RS approach of using annotations](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jakarta_RESTful_Web_Services), we could leverage their docs to avoid reinventing the wheel. I remember proposing something like this in the past before having openapi functions.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "- name: MyOperation\n  operation: 'http://mysite.com/api/{pathParam}#POST'\n  type: rest",
+        "- name: MyAction\n  functionRef:\n    refName: MyOperation\n    arguments:\n      headers:\n        - name: headerParam\n          value: 'headerValue'\n      path:\n        - name: pathParam   #references the {pathParam} value in the operation url\n          value: 'myendpoint' #replaces the {pathParam} value in the operation url\n      query:\n        - name: queryParam\n          value: 'queryvalue'\n      cookie:\n        - name: cookieParam\n          value: 'cookievalue'\n      body:\n        firstName: Tihomir\n        lastName: Surdilovic",
+        "operation: 'http://mysite.com/api/{pathParam}#POST'"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {

+      "serverless-workflow",

+    ],

+    },

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
+    ],

+  },
